title: docs: update Klein pod refs and SSH key filenames
author: voodoohop

gist.headline: Redrawing the Klein maps
gist.blurb: Updated our internal maps and SSH routes for the Klein pod. Keeping the hive's infrastructure documentation fresh and accurate.
gist.summary: Updated internal documentation and Claude skills with the new Klein pod ID, RunPod SSH relay routes, and network outage recovery procedures.
gist.impact: Developers and AI agents will now use the correct SSH keys and routing when connecting to or monitoring the Klein GPU instances.
gist.visual_concept: Polly the bee and the Monitor Robot looking at a map or a glowing terminal screen showing new routing paths. The robot has a CRT head displaying a map or network nodes. Polly is holding a tiny compass or a blueprint.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of Polly the bee wearing a tiny explorer's hat, looking at a glowing network map on the screen of a chunky CRT monitor robot. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and lavender gradient background. Warm lighting, lo-fi 8-bit aesthetic like Stardew Valley. Nostalgic but beautiful, emotionally warm.

image.prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of Polly the bee wearing a tiny explorer's hat, looking at a glowing network map on the screen of a chunky CRT monitor robot. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and lavender gradient background. Warm lighting, lo-fi 8-bit aesthetic like Stardew Valley. Nostalgic but beautiful, emotionally warm.
